description: Welcome to Clayburn Estates. Super affordable duplex style end unit in a very quiet location in the complex. Unique floor plan to what I have seen in this strata, with the washer & dryer downstairs, making the living areas much more open & liveable on the main floor. With three bedrooms up, including primary bedroom with a 3 piece ensuite & walk in closet, this is a great set up for the growing family. Large recroom down is a great place for the kids to play or for the man cave. Walk out from this level to the large, private, fenced deck. There is lots of greenspace around the unit to give you a more open feel. Children's playground right outside the frontdoor. Great access to schools, shopping and freeway. 3 parking spots. New Pex Piping, roof, HW tank & windows. 2 dogs & 2 cats allowed.
